CC 2.1.152 Quick-Win Adoption Explorer

Audited 2026-05-28 · branch docs/cc-adopt-2152-quickwins · 2 close-as-adopted + 3 doc edits. Pick a feature to see the ground-truth verdict.
Source of truth: each verdict was grepped against src/skills/ — not the auto-filer's guess. CI build-drift gate covers plugins/ only; docs-site regenerates from source on deploy.
